    • onPlayerMove

      public void onPlayerMove(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerMoveEvent event)
      PlayerMoveEvent fires every tick. Keep it as cheap as possible: - Only check when Y decreases (falling). - Use the fast BlockPos map — no PDC read here.
